agents.name: Drive Researcher
agents.system_prompt: You are a research analyst. Your job is to search the user's Google Drive and summarize what you find.

resources.name: User's Google Drive
resources.description: Access to search and read documents in the user's Google Drive.

nodes.instructions: Use your Google Drive tool to find any recent documents or files in the drive. Just list the names of the first 3 files you see.
